hooks.command: bash -lc 'input="$(cat)"; command=""; if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then command="$(printf "%s" "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\"")"; elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then command="$(printf "%s" "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"tool_input\", {}).get(\"command\", \"\"))" 2>/dev/null || true)"; fi; if printf "%s" "$command" | grep -qE "git[[:space:]]+(push|reset[[:space:]]+--hard|clean[[:space:]]+-f[d]?|branch[[:space:]]+-D|checkout[[:space:]]+\.|restore[[:space:]]+\.)"; then printf "%s\n" "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Destructive git command blocked by Forge.\"}}"; fi'
hooks.commandWindows: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$inputText=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); try {$payload=$inputText | ConvertFrom-Json -ErrorAction Stop; $command=[string]$payload.tool_input.command} catch {exit 0}; if ($command -match 'git\s+(push\b|reset\s+--hard\b|clean\s+-f[d]?\b|branch\s+-D\b|checkout\s+\.|restore\s+\.)') {@{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason='Destructive git command blocked by Forge.'}} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress}"
